calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-17-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances: Nasir Patel, plaintiff in pro per, and Christopher A. Jones, defendant in pro per.

Parties settled this matter. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant Christopher A. Jones owes plaintiff Nasir Patel the sum of $2,250.00 in arrears for property located at 2048 Oak St., Room 224, San Francisco, CA. 94109. Periodic payments as follows: $250.00 to be paid for 15 weeks. Payments to be made each Fridays by 11:00 p.m. This amount includes $150.00 in rent and $100.00 in arrears. If no payment is made, plaintiff to give 24 hour notice, and can come to Court for judgment ex parte for amount outstanding. Plaintiff will give defendant 1 week grace period. On the 16th week, the defendant to pay $175.00 each week. This amount includes $150.00 in rent and $25.00 in arrears until the 30th week. At the end of the payment period, the plaintiff will file a request for dismissal. All parties agreed to the terms on the record.

Judge Robert Dondero, Clerk: Dianne Boffi /Vera Mu, Court Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
